h93afb7d9g647eg4df7g901cgadbe7467715b: Thanks again for giving me that book. The magic that curls through its pages is truly remarkable.
he0f18596gd131g4feeg8263g49228377591f: Ah! There you are. How did you enjoy my deer stew this evening? Old family recipe.
he0f4f24bg2218g4b40gb31eg1fb3c0b9b189: Good! I tend to season it with spices from Kara-Tur, but given what's available to us, good old rosemary had to see us through.
ha73f6615ge6ebg4966g8903g3cbccbc4811b: Not that I mean to regale you with my culinary exploits. There's er...
h52eb73b0g37f5g4023gbc00gd482b3ed7d39: Well, there's actually something quite different I'd like to discuss.
h2a4bae8eg5843g4a43gaa09g1685299ea80e: We've been travelling together for a while now, and during those travels I've been observing you.
hb0e0c71eg5b58g4595gb9eagf94078e003b3: I want you to know that I like what I see.
h9b4ed5a8g75feg4fb6g954eg7a9ef67391a8: The way you defused the tension between Zevlor and Aradin.
h523d5ed2gec1ag41adg8343gc597fdaaf0c5: The way you stood in front of a crossbow to prevent a murder.
h14bdae3dgda02g4daag8c0fg9589667da94e: The way you got Kagha to release the girl.
h816d6051g072bg4171ga08fg343131826dfe: The way you handled Nettie when she poisoned you.
h0a8a75e7gea43g4bd5gae8ag98a86efd1feb: The way you got that boy out of a harpy's clutches.
h754e16c1g85f7g41c1g8502gb5a821d2d4be: The way you followed the protocol and brought me back to life.
h2b2ff20dg2e30g4752gbce5gd3925296b7fb: These deeds attest to a strong and noble character. They attest to prime leadership qualities as well.
hbe76d867gdf7ag4111g85d5ge5d9f6b048c4: In short: I've grown to trust you.
h1b2f3f72g1fa0g4343g8cb4g37313066b36c: Now I need you to place your trust in me.
h24a4c2dbgee1cg492bgadc3ge2b5a970d5c2: Our journey together is bound to last a while still. As such I feel compelled to speak.
h65a791e8g693bg4988g87a6g97817943a59e: I say this because there's something I desperately need, but while I'll tell you what that something is, I won't tell you why.
hfc9b938cgb78dg499cgbf0aga22e0cb3b814: I have to ask you to agree to this before carrying on with this conversation.
h30cae8f6g0d0cg449dg9b4eg9069ceea696d: Thank you. I see I did well to trust you. Now to the matter at hand.
h1c55e53dg97a7g43fag87bfgf0779618a033: You see, I have a... condition. A condition different from the tadpole, but just as deadly.
h4eb3fabegfe54g4289gba0cg6d915badaa8d: The only way to 'appease' said condition is for me to take powerful magical artefacts and absorb the Weave inside.
h79673ac9g1be8g4230g98a8g08973e872c10: It's been days since I last consumed an artefact, before we were abducted. It is time.
h9adfc38cg671ag4c89g979eg94b59e49d906: And by that I mean it's imperative that I find and consume powerful strands of Weave at the earliest possible juncture.
h7854b4d9gae9cg4d55g87a3g4836372f17c2: Tell me more about that condition of yours.
h42bb6420g579eg4976g9895ga68140e41cf0: That's part of the 'why' you agreed not to discuss.
h72f42587g0b18g452cgb863g6b8a69af9f0a: Wouldn't want to make an oath breaker out of you.
hd3414e2dg5844g4695g9d15gaffa2e8879a4: You've already seen more than I was willing to share, remember?
he847d4deg1c20g4501g9f8bg875d36752e3c: Best leave the darkness in darkness for now.
h515a2593geb0cg47bdg8780g4846b55666db: Where are we supposed to find the kind of artefacts you need?
hafc7342cgc1feg4b0cg995agbef4dc9ab79b: As luck would have it, Faerûn is full of them, though I do feel obliged to point out that items of power tend to be in the hands of the powerful.
hd4598668gbd10g40fcgbeecg27fe535e1398: There will be danger involved - or great cost.
hbbcd173fge3ebg46bfg8621g9eaa12c1b5da: Danger? I wouldn't have it any other way.
h31f12779gc593g40b6gb0fbg9d4a569db30d: Good. A bit of boldness will serve us well.
h9dffb47cga6f0g4899ga651g4200c25d3f6c: I know the allure these artefacts hold. I understand their value and their power. All this to say: I understand the sacrifice I ask of you.
hb670610cgb55ag49b4ga745g0afea2a2585a: I hope I can count on you.
h898c80abg4f9cg49ebg93c9ge72adb38f828: Oh, and as far as that tadpole trickery goes, I really do trust you'll not be so untoward again.
hf5f4afc5g4ce7g4ee8g85ffg2176a874fb0a: So you're saying I need to risk my life for you.
h0717d5c0g1dc6g4313ga262gf6192c635779: But if I may be so bold: it's for a very good cause indeed.
h8459c5b9g7cbdg4d46g8022g6ac41c21ddfb: When I acquire powerful magic items, I'm not so sure I'll choose you over them.
hefcd8babg87b8g4a91gb3e7g7c2339aa1b5a: That is your decision to make. I expect you to make the right one.
h6dd11fd9ge8acg4213gba3cg671f8ec7800a: Much is at stake. More than my own meagre life alone.
hdb5085e3g5928g45c6gadfcga366d76023d4: When I acquire powerful magic items, I'm not so sure I'll choose you over them again.
h9d668089g827cg41e6gb343g65bd5c866cc3: I can tell you right now I don't care at all for this wild Gale chase.
h5599b8b2g0b7bg4185g86a8g58d623862254: We've already done the finding. In fact you have one in your possession.
hcc238416ge689g4df7gbd1fg4277cd595615: We know where to find one, and we should go get our hands on it as soon as possible.
h713e9fe2gf0a9g40bdg893cgf637dadede20: What happens if you don't consume any artefacts?
h2ad7a677g1b06g4253gb810gd036f4dcc620: So Astarion wants to suck blood and you want to suck magic. What's next?
ha2847179gf8fbg47c8gbcc9g39768e4cd6a9: We all have our eccentricities. Ours are just more eccentric than most.
hab3e2078g62feg4834g9c91g6c6d9007c943: As a matter of fact, you should feel lucky to be travelling with men of taste.
h1f5b9a6fg9f3cg490agbf8cg219143cbb9fe: Define it as you will, the semantics aren't important, the condition's conditions are:
hc9043890gb2acg46d3ga5f0g5851ceb3482e: I am in need of artefacts. That's all there's to it.
hdfdbb092g62b0g4847gae59g871404607c66: No. It's unfair to demand blind faith in you.
h52335421g6e9dg4f85g86c9gd829242479a0: I understand that I'm asking for a lot, but I can't tell you everything. Not yet anyway.
h6812cdd5ge589g4736ga37cg16f0f802a2a2: Fine, I reconsider. Tell me what you need.
h8abc46b8g0e02g4f2fg88f4gea355f694e46: No, I won't. And that's final.
hf141f996gac0bg4d21g8317gb499cffe28b3: That's... truly disappointing. I see now that I misjudged you, so we'll dwell on the matter no longer.
h4e1cd695gca8eg4290g8d56gc51413d33ef9: And at least I know where I stand. This is a part of the journey I must walk alone.
had5e61ddg1dcag4b9fg8750gfc1a4d589a83: I brought you back to life, but this is where your trust in me ends?
hf7d0d9bcg5c49g46e5gb1b7g7aad689a7301: You sense secrecy and danger. Use your tadpole to probe Gale's thoughts.
hcedc1f00g8089g4f49gae4cg3d87d7525b92: *You become one with Gale's mind and you can feel something sinister oppressing you.*
hebd04736g0b62g40a2gaf32gdb609c2d667b: *It's... inside of you, a mighty darkness radiating from your chest.*
hdb205384gecf3g4dbfgab4fg59e41319c06f: *You could try to push further, but your hold over Gale feels brittle. It won't be easy delving deeper without him noticing.*
hcab90397g6218g4dcfga62bg13022eb352b8: *You see through Gale's eyes, staring down the corridors of a dread memory. A book, bound, then suddenly opened.*
h7abd4de3ge6a2g478cg8196g76d96972c07b: *Inside there are no pages, only a swirling mass of blackest Weave that pounces.*
h85adb633gfc0eg4ae4g87c5gb054ab4cedd1: *It's teeth, it's claws, it's unstoppable as it digs through you and becomes part of you. And gods, is it ever-hungry...*
h40ca4c11g8b60g4f26ga4fag91fca4d84e05: Keeping me in suspense, are you? Come on, tell me, do we have an agreement or not?
h6bd1d622g8a0bg4c3fgb005g5f07ee00dddd: No. I want nothing to do with the matter.
h3638a127g57d9g42fagbcfagb900f02f862d: It's a simple question, isn't it? What gives you pause?
hffbaff63ge457g4acfgbcedg6b04f53555da: Keep your reservations to yourself, and agree to Gale's condition.
h6297c07bge214g4924g8a96g22e8a0f08c70: Risk telling Gale what the tadpole showed you.
hbc15333bg8749g45b6gb5fag82698259e2b3: You used that thing against me? And you saw! After I told you...
hd00e5097g866cg46c7g8926g5214c0996197: This is a breach of trust that... And to think I thought you trustworthy in the first place!
hf0e09218g3d9cg4e42gb80egae40ddeb3219: I'm leaving. I cannot stand to be around such betrayal a moment longer.
hc5ce2b90g11efg4816gb8b7g7d988ae9edba: Be reasonable, Gale. I'm responsible for our party. I had to know.
h0f5d9b62g1ce3g4a8dga261g82e53b831b17: The need remains debatable, but I recognise your responsibility.
h8adbdb16g4e21g4fe0ga540gb74e6aded986: Perhaps I spoke in haste, it's just that... there are things - things I cannot speak of.
h2ad560b1gc918g4f8cgaed7g04743aa2a93f: Besides, what you saw... You read the opening line of a very big book, no more.
hfe6467d2g7d6cg4d19ga98dg4e409217d539: The darkness you perceived, that is my primary condition. A condition different from the tadpole, but just as deadly.
h4cddaed7g63a4g40edg9673g17f012380acb: That is a lie and you know it.
h224d5c97gae60g40b2gb492g34e0b7a9c1ab: This is where we part ways.
h64eeed5ag16f9g41d0g8f69gb3fc19132a76: You're in mortal danger twice over. To leave would be foolish, and you're no fool.
ha18d905egab0ag453dgb8c7gee03d05fbe84: I have to admit you're right about that.
hcda67db0ge486g4b12gb3d2gf0fde8f96c6c: I am a fool. A fool to have trusted you.
hda867635g287ag44b1ga43cg5160d2359d1f: What are you... You're using the tadpole against me?
h2c861c78g0846g4ebega4ccg7fad3bce9a8b: I'm afraid that's not going to work on me. Look, I appreciate your curiosity, but don't pursue this path.
h366cb80ag607cg4a7eg92edg71792148c487: Let us agree on actions first and explanations later. Yes?
h4d444847gfb4ag4d7dg9dd2g9f735a09293f: I'm still going to say no.
h8bc664d0g1012g4da6g851dg1c6c54bd21fa: Enough flattery. Where is this going?
hbfafa3a3gb8c7g41f3g9d12gde58ecc65905: An exchange. I expressed my trust in you, now I need you to place your trust in me.
h0bea407cg90beg4bfeg83adg47fef0f422d7: And yet I need you to place your trust in me in turn.
hb24dbe78g09b4g4621gb785g506951dc42a7: The way we got that boy out of a harpy's clutches.
h2bf3746cge6f3g4919g865ag35d33182a7d2: The way we handled Nettie when she wanted to poison us.
h760f5272g5cc2g4c84g8c59gb04ae6b77613: The way we got Kagha to release the girl.
h5167c099g5882g4ea0gb7f5g6e4bf4d362d6: The way one of our own stood in front of a crossbow to prevent a murder.
hd3fa43e5gfbbeg4b5eg80e0g70b30236379d: The way we defused the tension between Zevlor and Aradin.
h82c3e15dg9d59g4549ga92dg670c9c37043a: I assume it might have something to do with your mysterious protocol?
hfb9298f6gb4d3g4875g8399g2258b8056248: Why so tense all of a sudden?
h1a2ddcb4g1fe5g4fb2gb8dcg999b68a200b8: Some things are easier to explain than others. But first let me say this:
ha8d6a175gc997g4e84gaa93gcf460d724a04: Whatever it is, make it brief.
h691fe9a3g75f2g4e5bgafd6g729d5ca91317: Curious time to be dieting. Especially with a chef like myself around.
hf52c7ad1gab81g4b18ga91ag0cee057d8b32: Should have kept it in the family.
he32cffafgbd67g46f6gad31gde54b3a5f6b7: Can't argue with taste. Or the lack thereof.
hc63b4b89g95bbg49a6g9992g38f19a88c078: So! We've found an artefact rife with magic. Just the thing I need. May I?
h661180c2gaacag429eg8265gac0a95dfcbe6: Good news: The search for an object of power has been fruitful!
h0984f07eg90dbg45e7g8d91g66866bc38f3c: So! We've found an artefact rife with magic. Just the thing I need. May I?
h0dd400d5g7706g42f8gb294g23b64c01aecf: Good news: The search for an object of power has been fruitful!
h074dc17fgf391g4ba4ga106g31376c300cfa: Spare me a moment, if you please. I've something important to discuss with you.
he06fd459g910eg4686g8f7dg61e3be44c864: We've been travelling together for a while now and I think it's safe to say we don't always see eye to eye.
hea0b388bg16c0g4eaegbb38g23d6d03e68b4: That said, necessity compels me to set aside my reservations. I have no choice but to speak.
hbd2c31a3gaf9eg4742g98d1ge0d8f991dedc: Tell me more about that condition of yours.
h1b3a8d35g520eg41ceg9c08g1f0140af0a0d: I can say no more on the matter - not now anyway.
hbf80ef67g82a8g43f8g87a0g4acee41b052d: Just trust me when I say it's all of vital importance.
ha217b7a6gc40bg45d0ga610g33f464092e66: Where are we supposed to find the kind of artefacts you need?
h18f659a6gac99g4196gb55cgfcfa3f398411: What happens if you don't consume any artefacts?
h1d931768g8757g44a0g972dg8c6773232a75: So Astarion wants to suck blood and you want to suck magic. What's next?
hefadbe98g1cf7g43eegad1dg78f9b5c269d9: Just say what you have to say, will you?
hd8a1b835g7c9dg481dg87cag5ce1d1a9278b: You do have a choice. The choice to shut up for instance.
h76635d1bg2764g462agb522g9a1c950b297c: Perhaps you should take your own advice and listen.
h699170d2gaabcg4c91g91d1g91e868adaa60: We've been travelling together for a while now and it's just about time that I shared something with you.
h47203f96ga17eg41b0ga6bfgf0acc2a64f1a: It's a rather personal matter that I'd have preferred to keep quiet, but needs must when the devil drives. I have no choice but to speak.
ha23ae562g0c86g4e2cgb24egb8de7e365cfe: Listen - I am in dire need of magic to consume. You have what I require in your possession. May I?
h483e42bbg833ag4f9ag8c5ag13065211b5cf: I can feel the storm abating. Yes, this will keep my condition in check - for a precious while.
hd20c7eb8g1fcfg4adeg8596gb8de848f8316: How long will that precious while last?
h0bf81130ge330g4f30gb6degcaff3bd83df2: It's hard to predict the effect any given artefact has, but my condition is hardly a patient one.
h6a464263g9353g4994gb046ga6221c7d28ec: Rather soon I will feel it stir again - like a distant thunder sending tremors through the soul.
he06c29fdg839fg434ega8cdg50a2504e591d: I will need to consume another artefact before the lightning strikes. There's no choice but to find more.
h0957e1a2gcd79g4552g80a8gbb613d67550d: In the meantime, my thanks again.
h5fce2f84g4fdag421bg8910gce5e85fcedec: My lady, I bow to your boundless kindness!
h9c6b6252ga1b0g409egad66g0f020b565c6c: My lord, I bow to your boundless kindness!
h283fa904g6151g4e19g8f29ga102b95d4f95: That condition of yours is a very expensive one.
h3dcd8b2fgd05eg448agb684g0764b7ff342c: I obtained it in Waterdeep. Nothing there comes cheap.
hf1eb1620gb931g4faegae84g87637c7419fa: Thanks don't get me that artefact back.
hb98732ccg0facg499bg9793gb24f1d21305f: I myself am a much more powerful artefact in your arsenal. Rest assured of that.
hb5586311g4110g40dagbfecge22047e7744d: I think I should be reimbursed for my efforts.
hb9725d0cg2930g43b2ga00cg8f3431aa4e34: As long as we travel together, what's mine is yours. And if we survive our many ordeals, I'll host you a banquet in Waterdeep the likes of which you've never seen.
hfeebe477ge877g45e1ga786g54dd6b51e625: Such promises will have to wait however. My condition is hardly a patient one.
hbb09eff5g4456g4186ga6e0gc2a0e04eb3d4: So this is what regret feels like.
hf2c4ad4fgd622g45aag8b23g3a393e25219d: A feeling you may have to grow accustomed to while I'm around. My condition is hardly a patient one.
h41dd85d7gfb0dg458dg84cfg8e68562ce3fb: Gods, it's like a draught of cool water soothing a parched throat - welcome and wonderful.
h16d5d9ecg7bd4g4cc1g8b68g4537c4478ec0: There was a lot of magic in this artefact. I can't quite remember a time I've felt so peaceful inside.
h91ae5bebgad02g4e62gae9bga0f925655e0a: It's good to perceive this constant fear repressed into a quiet scare. Let's hope it will last a good long while.
h829b0e70g4766g4c17ga789gc1bd5a1bf22f: And I'm impressed once more by your benevolence!
h1e2bd124gd79bg4787g9eb4g85b2fc9f9f97: I say that with great sincerity. Mere days have passed since our first acquaintance, but you've gained the respect of years.
h1f0d3c20gd35dg44d7g8bc8g7c7adcf365d4: As such, I do not wish to give you false hope. We're only treating the symptoms, not the cause.
hb70bacb0g9276g462aga41eg33f2e498febc: That said, this newfound calm I'm experiencing gives me reason to accept without prejudice a certain degree of optimism.
hd99d41efg3eb9g43bdg9b15g2188835f5b0d: Time is a precious gift. With time, we may even reach Baldur's Gate, a city rife with magic, wizards, scholars, and perhaps: solutions.
h91e6d65agccccg4225gae41g9ac8801789bd: In that case I share your optimism. Here's to the journey ahead.
hba1af8c7g4005g4f02g93e2g01718c0983cf: Oh, I can picture it now: academies, libraries, laboratories - the assembled knowledge of centuries that may just set us free.
hc375c94ag5a14g4298gbe3bg9fe75380bf87: Better yet: soft beds, home cooked meals, and all the other little luxuries this wilderness so brashly denies us.
h192873e0gff6dg43dfgacfag5f8de47ce349: Gods, I'd pay a king's ransom for a hot, lavender-scented bath - minstrels serenading as I close my eyes and let the water's warmth dissolve all woes.
hb3cdd94agddf3g451aga30cg7271b637ac2a: The tadpole is my main concern. I'm in need of solutions too.
h4837fda4g0bd1g4497ga190g80a7476fde0f: Baldur's Gate lies many miles to the west. Don't get your hopes up.
h0d97f53ag105ag4789gbed4g38a45fb525a9: A constant fear? That sounds unpleasant.
h46a24e45g2096g4c75gbc74g1a94f5d886b5: Unpleasant, certainly. Gut wrenching too. Heart rending even, if pinched for an adjective.
ha7cf1ea7g472eg4dcag868dgd77c0007c1fb: Then again - keeps you on your toes.
h942df075g0d04g42e8g9426g83375568b886: On a more serious note, I do not wish to give you false hope. We're only treating the symptoms, not the cause.
h86b91c6cg7805g46d3gb532ge08223a454e8: Let's hope this was the last artefact I had to part with.
h058689ecgf9a8g440cg9d58ga91071a2ab29: Come, come, these are mere fabled objects of great to enormous value.
ha54156b9g977bg4cecgb07eg92919faca591: My continued presence though - quite priceless!
h634af4efg04c1g44bfgb597gdff4696b8550: Hmmm. We'll need to find a way to open the book first.
h367b7b54g28ebg46b9ga29fg9fed92a8e0b5: Give him the Amulet of Selûne's Chosen.
h8f0c55d8g3d2fg44edga12eg215ece05b148: I'm not ready to part with an artefact yet.
h0a2f2178gcadcg42c5gb25ag7ed51fa0b9cf: I urge you to reconsider. There could be consequences beyond our ken.
h7612e894gbc0dg487cg8874g2cd268f72242: Please! Time is of the essence.
hf3b44789g36ccg442eg8397g83c24f07fddd: If you're not willing to part with this artefact so be it, but I implore you to be on the lookout for another.
hf1ad574eg0b23g456bg8fa4gb4d74d3ed9e9: What will happen to this item should I give it to you?
hb55e4430g59ceg4f9fgb367g21a124834a1d: I will consume the magic inside. What was a powerful artefact will be rendered no more than a trinket.
hec37de21g3e8cg4d73g88fbgc202a7834fb4: But it will save my life - even if only temporarily.
hafc2faffgc3a3g4017ga1d8g02d8e38db834: I need to remind you that I am in need of magic to consume. Soon. Very soon.
h7fd868e7g8df7g4abcg81ccg6fb659cf8314: I need to remind you that I am in need of magic to consume. Soon. Very soon.
hfd261271g7894g44b2g9f26gb10dfa18022b: Listen - I'm dying to get my hands on an artefact of power, and I'm not speaking metaphorically. You have it. I need it. Now.
h98e50ea1gd6e4g41a4g9784g20875944a62b: Gods - I can feel my condition overtaking me. I need an artefact to appease it and fast.
h69bf1e1eg7a80g49b9g895dgeb4b29d87698: Gods - I can feel my condition overtaking me. I need an artefact to appease it and fast.
h2579cd7dgd255g4198g87fag8a612069d804: We haven't very long before I reach the point of no return.
hd4d1d415g7fccg4b03g95c3g0f56167a88cb: We've actually discovered an object of power that fits the bill, but we've yet to obtain it.
h5cd967e1gbb45g4827g9c21g0dc015f7f9f8: The Iron Flask is such an artefact.
h6aa7352ag21acg4556ga7dega1c42e11ec99: If I may be so forward - what are we waiting for?
hb41d60d8g4decg4a14g87f3g1b46abdd64bc: So now we need but to do the obtaining - and we're bound to come across more during our travels.
h8046588ag30c7g435eg86f0g70fe604592f1: The Staff of Crones is such an artefact.
h4b6848b1g53acg4154gb6d6ga329c67e4f7a: The Sword of Justice is such an artefact.
hbd13fb71g50c7g4deeg9b3bg0314c66be4f5: The Night Walkers is such an artefact.
h3eb56c4eg327bg431bgaf94g5f7ce3f38989: The Shadow of Menzoberranzan is such an artefact.
h77352ee9g8a59g4511ga66dg5901ba9049be: The Amulet of Selûne's Chosen is such an artefact.
hbf69c14bg42fbg445dgbdc2gf5b84926a46f: The Necromancy of Thay is such an artefact.
